# Design System — Rabi Rashid Mohammed Shaik Portfolio
*Generated by UI UX Pro Max · Source of truth for all design decisions*

---

## Concept

**"Restrained Command"** — A senior banking executive's digital presence. Dark, precise, intentionally minimal. Every element earns its place. Motion is used to *inform* hierarchy, not decorate. The site reads like a Bloomberg terminal met a top-tier consulting deck.

---

## Color Palette

### Dark Mode (Default)

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--bg-base` | `#0A0A0F` | Page background |
| `--bg-surface` | `#111118` | Cards, timeline items |
| `--bg-elevated` | `#1A1A26` | Hovered cards, tooltips |
| `--border` | `#1E1E2E` | Dividers, card outlines |
| `--fg-primary` | `#F4F4F5` | Headings, primary text |
| `--fg-secondary` | `#A1A1AA` | Body copy, bullets |
| `--fg-muted` | `#52525B` | Labels, metadata, dates |
| `--accent` | `#C9A84C` | CTAs, highlights, timeline nodes |
| `--accent-glow` | `#C9A84C22` | Subtle glow behind accent elements |
| `--accent-hover` | `#E2C068` | Accent hover state |

### Light Mode

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| `--bg-base` | `#FAFAFA` | Page background |
| `--bg-surface` | `#FFFFFF` | Cards |
| `--bg-elevated` | `#F4F4F5` | Hovered surfaces |
| `--border` | `#E4E4E7` | Dividers |
| `--fg-primary` | `#09090B` | Headings |
| `--fg-secondary` | `#3F3F46` | Body |
| `--fg-muted` | `#A1A1AA` | Metadata |
| `--accent` | `#B8922A` | CTAs (deepened for contrast) |

**Accent rationale:** Warm gold (`#C9A84C`) signals executive stature, resonates with the Saudi/GCC market context, and creates a distinguished premium feel without the overused blue of generic fintech templates.

---

## Typography

### Pairing: **Playfair Display + Inter**
*Category: Serif + Sans — "Classic Elegant"*

| Role | Font | Weight | Size | Tracking |
|------|------|--------|------|----------|
| Hero name (Display) | Playfair Display | 700 | 64–80px | -2px |
| Section headings (H2) | Playfair Display | 600 | 36–48px | -1px |
| Sub-headings (H3) | Inter | 600 | 20–24px | -0.3px |
| Body / bullets | Inter | 400 | 16px | 0 |
| Labels / metadata | Inter | 500 | 12–13px | +0.8px uppercase |
| Navigation | Inter | 500 | 14px | +0.5px uppercase |
| CTA buttons | Inter | 600 | 15px | +0.3px |

**CSS Import:**
```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap');
```

**Tailwind config:**
```js
fontFamily: {
  serif: ['Playfair Display', 'serif'],
  sans: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
}
```

**Rationale:** Playfair Display's editorial serif weight creates immediate authority on the hero name — a senior executive's name should feel *set in stone*. Inter handles all functional text: legible, neutral, trusted by every major fintech.

---

## Style: Motion-Driven (Restrained)

| Property | Spec |
|----------|------|
| Border radius | `4px` (cards), `2px` (buttons) — sharp, executive |
| Shadow (cards) | `0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px #1E1E2E` |
| Shadow (hover) | `0 8px 32px rgba(201,168,76,0.08), 0 0 0 1px #C9A84C33` |
| Background texture | Subtle grain noise overlay at 3% opacity on hero |
| Gradient | `radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, #C9A84C08 0%, transparent 60%)` on hero |

---

## Animation System (framer-motion)

### Global tokens
```ts
const EASE_OUT = [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]      // Enter: fast start, smooth settle
const EASE_IN  = [0.7, 0, 1, 0.3]        // Exit: fast exit
const DURATION = { fast: 0.2, base: 0.35, slow: 0.6 }
const STAGGER  = 0.08                     // Between list items
```

### Per-section specs

| Section | Animation | Config |
|---------|-----------|--------|
| **Hero name** | Character stagger reveal | `staggerChildren: 0.04`, y: 20→0, opacity 0→1 |
| **Hero subtitle** | Fade + slide | delay 0.4s, y: 12→0 |
| **Hero CTAs** | Fade in | delay 0.8s |
| **Section headings** | whileInView fade+slide | y: 24→0, duration 0.5s |
| **Timeline items** | Stagger on scroll | `staggerChildren: 0.1`, x: -16→0 |
| **Cert cards** | whileInView fade+scale | scale 0.96→1, stagger 0.07s |
| **Skill chips** | Stagger fade | stagger 0.04s per chip |
| **Card hover** | Lift | `whileHover: { y: -4 }`, shadow transition 0.2s |
| **Page transition** | Fade | opacity 0→1, 0.3s on mount |

**Rules:**
- No springs on any text animation — use `ease` curves only
- No bounce (`stiffness` > 200 only for interactive feedback)
- All `whileInView` uses `viewport: { once: true, margin: "-80px" }`
- Always include `prefers-reduced-motion` fallback via `useReducedMotion()`

---

## Layout & Spacing

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| Section padding Y | `96px / 64px (mobile)` | Top/bottom of each section |
| Container max-width | `1100px` | Main content column |
| Container padding X | `24px (mobile)` / `48px (desktop)` | Side gutters |
| Card padding | `24px` | Inner card spacing |
| Grid gap | `16px (mobile)` / `24px (desktop)` | Between cards |
| Timeline line X | `1px solid #1E1E2E` | Vertical connector |

**Breakpoints:**
- `sm`: 640px
- `md`: 768px
- `lg`: 1024px
- `xl`: 1280px

---

## Component Specs

### Navigation
- Sticky top, `backdrop-blur-md` + `bg-bg-base/80`
- Left: Name (Inter 500, small) | Right: Resume link, Light/Dark toggle
- No hamburger menu — links fit in one line on mobile at small size
- Active section: gold accent underline (2px)

### Hero Section
- Full-viewport height
- Radial gradient + noise texture
- Name: Playfair Display 700, 72px desktop / 44px mobile
- Title line: Inter 400, muted, 20px
- "12+ years" tag: small chip, gold border
- Two CTAs: Primary (Download Resume, filled gold) + Secondary (Get in Touch, outlined)

### Experience Timeline
- Left-aligned vertical line (1px, border color)
- Gold dot nodes at each role
- Company name: Inter 600
- Role + dates: Inter 400, muted
- Bullets: Inter 400, 15px, secondary color

### Certification Cards
- 2×3 grid on desktop, 1×6 on mobile
- Gold top-border accent (2px)
- Category badge (small chip)
- Hover: y:-4, gold shadow glow

### Skills
- Grouped chips by category
- Category label: Inter 500 uppercase, muted, 11px
- Chip: Inter 500, 13px, `bg-surface` border `border`
- Hover: gold border

### Contact CTA
- Full-width dark section
- Centered email + LinkedIn icons
- One headline, two icon links, optional availability text

---

## Dark/Light Mode Toggle

- Stored in `localStorage` + `<html class="dark">`
- Transition: `transition-colors duration-300` on body
- Icon: Sun/Moon (Lucide), 20px, in nav

---

## Accessibility

- All contrast ratios ≥ 4.5:1 (verified against dark bg)
- Focus rings: `2px solid #C9A84C` with `2px offset`
- `prefers-reduced-motion`: all framer-motion variants wrapped in `useReducedMotion()`
- All interactive elements: `cursor-pointer`, min 44×44px touch target
- `alt` text on all images, `aria-label` on icon-only buttons

---

## Anti-patterns (DO NOT USE)

- No bouncy springs on text or section reveals
- No rotating/spinning loader animations
- No emoji icons — use Lucide SVG only
- No gradient text on body copy
- No box shadows from generic Tailwind (use custom tokens above)
- No generic blue (`#3B82F6`) — use gold accent exclusively
- No template-feeling section titles ("My Projects", "About Me")
